betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Alloys & Advanced Materials§f

§aSmelt and forge advanced alloys for high-tier machinery and components!§f

§e8§f alloys crafted in the §bInduction Smelter§f. Pre-mix ingredients as §bBlends§f (shapeless crafting) for faster processing.

§6Alloy Recipes§f:
§b• Steel§f — Pulverized Iron + Coal Coke
§b• Electrum§f — Gold + Silver
§b• Invar§f — Iron + Nickel
§b• Bronze§f — Copper + Tin
§b• Constantan§f — Copper + Nickel
§b• Signalum§f — Pulverized Silver + Pulverized Copper + Destabilized Redstone (§e4:3:1§f)
§b• Lumium§f — Pulverized Silver + Pulverized Copper + Energized Glowstone (§e4:3:1§f)
§b• Enderium§f — Platinum + Iridium + Resonant Ender

§eTip§f: Signalum, Lumium, and Enderium unlock the highest-tier §6Thermal Expansion§f machine upgrades.
